summary: Iteration 37 - Royalty Splits Management for Label Dashboard. All backend endpoints and frontend UI elements verified and working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/label/royalties returns 200 for authenticated user
Backend: GET /api/label/royalties returns summary with total_revenue, total_artist_payouts, total_label_earnings, artist_count
Backend: GET /api/label/royalties returns artists array with gross_revenue, artist_split, label_split, artist_earnings, label_earnings
Backend: GET /api/label/royalties requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: Default split is 70% artist / 30% label when no custom split is set
Backend: PUT /api/label/artists/{artist_id}/split sets custom royalty split successfully
Backend: PUT /api/label/artists/{artist_id}/split returns 400 if splits don't add to 100%
Backend: PUT /api/label/artists/{artist_id}/split returns 400 if splits are negative
Backend: PUT /api/label/artists/{artist_id}/split returns 404 for non-roster artist
Backend: PUT /api/label/artists/{artist_id}/split requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: Earnings calculated correctly based on split percentages
Backend: Summary totals match sum of individual artist values
Frontend: Label Dashboard has Overview and Royalty Splits tabs
Frontend: Royalty Splits tab shows 3 summary cards (Total Gross Revenue, Artist Payouts in green, Label Earnings in gold)
Frontend: Royalty Splits table shows artist name, gross revenue, artist %, artist earnings, label %, label earnings, edit button
Frontend: Clicking edit button on a royalty row shows input field for artist split percentage
Frontend: Revenue Split Visualization shows green/gold bar per artist
Frontend: Saving a split updates the table and refreshes data with success toast
critical_code_review_comments: Royalty endpoints correctly validate splits add to 100% and are non-negative
Earnings calculations are accurate: artist_earnings = gross_revenue * artist_split / 100
Summary totals correctly aggregate individual artist values
Frontend properly displays edit mode with input field and save/cancel buttons
Revenue Split Visualization uses correct colors (green for artist, gold for label)
seed_data_creation: Admin user has 1 artist on roster (John Doe, user_id: user_0f42dea5a132)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 37 tested Royalty Splits Management feature. All endpoints working: GET /api/label/royalties (returns summary and artists array with royalty data), PUT /api/label/artists/{artist_id}/split (set custom split with validation). Frontend at /label has 'Royalty Splits' tab showing 3 summary cards, per-artist royalty table with editable splits, and revenue split visualization bar. Default split is 70% artist / 30% label. John Doe is on roster with user_id: user_0f42dea5a132.

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs. All endpoints are fully functional with real MongoDB data.

edit_functionality: Save updates split and refreshes data
